ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "federation" TEXT /* Federation that governs the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the division belongs to */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "division_level" INTEGER /* Level of the division (1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium of the team */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Head coach of the team */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Captain of the team */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic is for */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "shots_taken" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the bet is for */,
  "bookmaker" TEXT /* Bookmaker providing the odds */,
  "home_odds" REAL /* Odds for a home win */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds for a draw */,
  "away_odds" REAL /* Odds for an away win */,
  "over_25_odds" REAL /* Odds for over 2.5 goals */,
  "under_25_odds" REAL /* Odds for under 2.5 goals */,
  "odds_date" TEXT /* Date the odds were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, analyst, coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_match_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user match access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has to the match data (view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_match_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
